ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the factor (e.g., Income below poverty level, Public transportation efficiency) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the factor (e.g., Socioeconomic, Environmental) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the factor (e.g., Income, Education) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the factor (e.g., percentage, dollars per capita) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type (e.g., Theft, Battery) */,
  "crime_category" TEXT /* Category of the crime type (e.g., Violent, Property) */,
  "crime_sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the crime type (e.g., Assault, Burglary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area */,
  "community_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the community area */,
  "community_area_type" TEXT /* Type of community area (e.g., neighborhood, district) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the community area (e.g., downtown, suburban) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencing factor */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community area */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of reported crimes */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Statistical correlation between the factor and crime type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime occurrence */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the crime occurrence */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the crime occurrence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES crime_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric (e.g., Pearson correlation coefficient) */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type for the alert */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Crime count threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert is active */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification (e.g., analyst, law enforcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, law enforcement, community organizer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report requested (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report requested (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, database) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the data source (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
